attendeeAvailability.description: An array that shows the availability status of each attendee for this meeting suggestion.

confidence.description: A percentage that represents the likelhood of all the attendees attending.

locations.description: An array that specifies the name and geographic location of each meeting location for this meeting suggestion.

meetingTimeSlot.description: A time period suggested for the meeting.

order.description: Order of meeting time suggestions sorted by their computed confidence value from high to low, then by chronology if there are suggestions with the same confidence.

organizerAvailability.description: Availability of the meeting organizer for this meeting suggestion. The possible values are: free, tentative, busy, oof, workingElsewhere, unknown.

suggestionReason.description: Reason for suggesting the meeting time.
